name: vault-connector-for-obsidian
description: Read, write and search your Obsidian vault from Claude — works directly with Markdown files on disk, no plugins required.
long_description: A local connector that lets Claude work with any Obsidian vault. It reads and writes Markdown files directly on disk, so it works whether or not Obsidian is running and needs no community plugins. Point it at your vault folder and Claude can list, read, search, create and append to notes, follow [[wikilinks]] for backlinks, maintain daily notes, and edit YAML frontmatter. All access is sandboxed to the single folder you configure. Obsidian is a trademark of Dynalist Inc.; this is an independent, unaffiliated connector.

vault_path.title: Vault folder
vault_path.description: The folder of the Obsidian vault Claude should work with. All reads and writes are limited to this folder.

daily_folder.title: Daily notes folder
daily_folder.description: Vault-relative folder for daily notes (leave empty for the vault root).

daily_format.title: Daily note date format
daily_format.description: Filename format for daily notes using YYYY, MM and DD tokens.

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: List Markdown notes, optionally within a folder.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List sub-folders of the vault or a folder.

tools.name: read_note
tools.description: Read the full content of a note.

tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Full-text and tag search across the vault.

tools.name: get_backlinks
tools.description: Find notes linking to a target via [[wikilinks]].

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Create a note with optional frontmatter.

tools.name: append_to_note
tools.description: Append text to a note, optionally under a heading.

tools.name: append_to_daily_note
tools.description: Append an entry to today's (or a given date's) daily note.

tools.name: update_frontmatter
tools.description: Set or remove YAML frontmatter fields.
